meta.title: DoVe — Find Venice civic numbers
meta.description: Find the exact location of civic numbers in Venice's sestieri and lagoon islands. Free and offline.

hero.title: DoVe?
hero.subtitle: Find the real location of civic numbers in Venice's sestieri and lagoon islands

problem.headline: In Venice, finding an address is a different story.
problem.body: In the historic center, civic numbers don't follow streets — they follow sestieri. "San Marco 3456" doesn't indicate any specific street: you need to know where that number sits within the sestiere. On the islands it works differently. DoVe knows both systems.
problem.sestieriDesc: Cannaregio, Castello, Dorsoduro, San Marco, San Polo, Santa Croce and Giudecca each have their own independent progressive numbering. The same number exists in every sestiere.
problem.isoleDesc: Murano, Burano, Lido, Pellestrina and the other islands use the classic street + number system, like the rest of Italy.

showcase.title: Find it in three taps.
showcase.feature1Desc: All civic numbers are in the app. No connection needed, even without signal.
showcase.feature2Desc: Precise GPS coordinates for every number. Opens directly in Apple Maps or Google Maps.
showcase.feature3Desc: No subscription, no tracking, no sign-up.

searchDemo.title: Try it now
searchDemo.subtitle: Choose a sestiere or island, enter the civic number and find it on the map.

howItWorks.title: How Venice numbering works
howItWorks.intro: Venice has a civic numbering system unlike anywhere else in the world. The historic center uses progressive numbering by sestiere, while the lagoon islands use standard street addresses. DoVe covers both systems.

sestieriSystem.title: Sestiere numbering
sestieriSystem.description: The historic center of Venice is divided into six sestieri (plus Giudecca), each with its own independent progressive numbering. Addresses prioritize the sestiere over the street name: the same street name can exist in different sestieri.
sestieriSystem.exampleDesc: Sestiere + number. The street name is secondary.

zoneSystem.title: Standard addressing
zoneSystem.description: The lagoon islands — Murano, Burano, Lido, Pellestrina and others — and some areas like Sant'Elena use the classic street + number system, like the rest of Italy.
zoneSystem.exampleDesc: Street + number + island, like on the mainland.

howItWorks.demoSubtitle: Select a sestiere or island, search for a civic number, and see it on the map.

search.title: Try the search
search.sestieriDesc: The historic center uses progressive numbering by sestiere. Choose the sestiere and search by number.
search.zoneDesc: Lagoon islands use street addresses. Choose the island, search for the street and number.

download.title: Download DoVe
download.subtitle: Available for free on iOS and Android
